subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 528330888/170929011 is not a GRB
body:
R. Hamburg (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM
Team:

The following Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger,
tentatively classified as a GRB, was in fact likely due to particle
activity:

528330888 / 170929011 / 22:34:43.28 UT
